tasks.title: Remove clouds and bubs from wizard
tasks.done_when: Wizard has 5 pages. No references to _clouds or _bubs in wizard_screen.dart. flutter analyze clean.

tasks.title: Skip wizard on entry creation
tasks.done_when: Tapping + on DayListScreen goes directly to DayEntryScreen without showing the wizard. No WizardScreen import in day_list_screen.dart.

tasks.title: Keep Add Details button on DayEntryScreen
tasks.done_when: Psychology icon button exists in app bar with tooltip 'Add Details'. Tapping it launches WizardScreen. Wizard result updates entry fields (excluding clouds/bubs).

tasks.title: Remove clouds/bubs from display chips and statistics
tasks.done_when: No 'Clouds' or 'Bubs' chips on DayEntryScreen wizard card. getWizardAverages() returns only Mood, Sleep, Workload, Energy. Statistics screen shows 4 check-in metrics instead of 6.

tasks.title: Verify on device: entry creation flow and wizard button

cases: Tap + on main screen → goes directly to editor (no wizard)
Tap 🧠 Add Details button → opens wizard with 5 pages (no clouds/bubs)
Complete wizard → chips show Mood, Sleep, X, Work, Energy only
Statistics screen shows 4 check-in averages (no Clouds/Bubs)
Existing entries with clouds/bubs data still load without errors

tasks.done_when: All 5 manual test cases pass on Pixel 6a.

tasks.title: Host privacy policy at public URL
tasks.done_when: Privacy policy is live at a public HTTPS URL and renders correctly in a browser.

tasks.title: Register Google Play Developer account
tasks.done_when: Play Console dashboard is accessible with an active, verified developer account.

tasks.title: Build release AAB
tasks.done_when: flutter build appbundle --release produces app-release.aab under 50MB with no errors.

tasks.title: Submit to Play Console
tasks.done_when: App is uploaded with complete store listing, linked privacy policy, and status shows 'In review' or 'Published'.

tasks.title: Complete Health Connect declaration
tasks.done_when: Health Connect declaration submitted in Play Console for steps, heart rate, and sleep data types.

tasks.title: Schema migration v2 → v3: drop clouds and bubs columns
tasks.done_when: Bump _dbVersion to 3. _onUpgrade rebuilds day_entries without clouds/bubs columns. _onCreate creates table without them. Existing data migrates cleanly (columns dropped, no data loss on other fields). flutter analyze clean.

tasks.title: Remove clouds/bubs from DayEntry model
tasks.done_when: DayEntry class has no clouds or bubs field. Constructor, copyWith, toJson, fromJson, toDatabaseMap, fromDatabaseMap all omit clouds/bubs. flutter analyze clean across all files.

tasks.title: Verify no remaining references to clouds/bubs in codebase
tasks.done_when: grep -ri 'clouds\|bubs' lib/ returns zero matches. flutter analyze clean. App builds and runs on device.

tasks.title: Fix Health Connect permission spam in logs
tasks.done_when: Permission check runs once per app session, not repeatedly. Device logs show 'permissions were granted' at most once per launch.

tasks.title: Add empty-state prompt to entry editor
tasks.done_when: When a new entry is opened with default wizard values, a subtle banner or prompt says 'Tap 🧠 to add your daily check-in details'. Banner disappears after wizard is completed.

criteria: All unit and widget tests pass
No references to 'xanax' remain in lib/ directory
Wizard shows exactly 5 pages (mood, sleep, x, workload, energy)
